message:
🌱 Extract hardcoded UI strings to i18n translation keys (#2343)

Extract 21 hardcoded user-facing strings from 9 card components into
the cards i18n namespace. Adds new translation key sections for
fleetCompliance, crossClusterPolicy, llmModels, mlNotebooks,
configDrift, kagentiTopology, kustomizationStatus, and kubecostOverview.
Wires the existing namespaceQuotas.createGpuQuota key that was defined
but unused. Fixes namespace prefixes for existing t() calls when
switching default namespace from common to cards.

Fixes #2324

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
